description_long: This hospital building features a sprawling, multi-wing layout with a predominantly white exterior and numerous rectangular windows, many of which are accented with blue frames. The structure is composed of several interconnected blocks of varying heights, with flat roofs and a mix of large and small window groupings. The facade is mostly smooth, with some sections displaying grid-like window patterns and others featuring solid wall segments. There are visible entry points and what appear to be loading or service areas, as well as a section with a slightly protruding, angular canopy. The overall design is functional and modern, prioritizing utility and accessibility, with minimal decorative elements. The building's scale and layout suggest it is designed to accommodate a high volume of patients, staff, and visitors.
description: A large, modern hospital with a white exterior, blue-accented windows, and a multi-wing, flat-roofed design. The structure is functional, with numerous windows and entry points.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with a prominent grid of windows, a central entry area, and multiple interconnected wings.
description_view_1: From this angle, the building's depth and the arrangement of its various blocks are visible, with more emphasis on the side walls and window groupings.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear and side sections, revealing additional entry points and a more segmented layout of the hospital's wings.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the back and side, displaying the angular canopy and the staggered arrangement of the building's sections.
